meaning: SHR-2002 success comes from co-blocking TIGIT/CD155 and PVRIG/CD112, not merely higher PVRIG affinity.
modeling_use: Do not rank this class only by PVRIG docking score.

meaning: Anti-PVRIG nanobody is fused at the N terminus of anti-TIGIT antibody in the reported BsAb format.
modeling_use: When modeling VHH-Fc/BsAb, check whether CDRs remain exposed after fusion.

meaning: PVRIG-30 family is a positive PVRIG arm reference; local sequence exists from WO2021180205A1.
modeling_use: Use PVRIG-30/30H2 to calibrate PVRIG-arm structure/docking, not as new design.

meaning: Reported lead uses IgG4-style bispecific format; Fc/format can change NK/T-cell outputs.
modeling_use: Separate paratope score from format score.

meaning: Positive mechanism requires both receptor-ligand blockade and T/NK functional activation signals.
modeling_use: Add downstream function labels when available.

meaning: Activity improves/extends in PD-1 or PD-L1 combination context.
modeling_use: Do not assume single-agent PVRIG blockade fully captures biology.
